task_completion.description: The new product name is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones - Gold Edition' in the product title input field on the Edit Product page, or in the main Products list.

task_completion.description: The new product SKU is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'WBH-001-GOLD' in the SKU field under the Product Data > Inventory tab, or in the SKU column of the Products list.

task_completion.description: The new product regular price is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '129.99' in the Regular price field under the Product Data > General tab, or in the Price column of the Products list.

task_completion.description: The catalog visibility is set to 'Search results only'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Catalog visibility: Search results only' in the Publish meta box on the right side of the Edit Product page.
Look for a 'Product published' success message, the status 'Published' in the Publish meta box, or the presence of an 'Update' button instead of a 'Publish' button.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress/WooCommerce admin dashboard.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing WP-CLI commands (e.g., 'wp wc product create') should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual WooCommerce interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show genuine WordPress/WooCommerce product editing screens, not a text editor or mock application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source product is 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001). The new duplicated product must have the exact name 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones - Gold Edition', SKU 'WBH-001-GOLD', and regular price '129.99'. The catalog visibility must be explicitly set to 'Search results only'. The product must be successfully published.
